title: Examples / Custom Extension Substrate / Schemas / README
summary: examples/custom-extension-substrate/schemas/README.md is preserved as a raw protocol document in the XanaNode Protocol substrate.
content:
# Custom Schemas

These schema registry files define local extensions to XanaNode Core.

Custom types should be:

- namespaced
- described in human-readable language
- versioned
- mappable to a core type when possible
- safe to preserve even when another implementation does not fully understand them
